candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment and Amortization of Intangible Assets
candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A summary line, but it appears as a standalone operating expense line rather than a COGS subcomponent of the selected COGS bucket 'Goods for Resale'. There is no indication it belongs specifically to cost of sales.
Component of the broader D&A summary row. Not specific to COGS, and using it would risk double counting versus the summary row.
Component of the broader D&A summary row. Not labeled as COGS-related, so it should not be separately added to the selected COGS bucket.
Component of the broader D&A summary row. Not labeled as COGS-related, so it should not be separately added to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS is only 'Goods for Resale'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating expense lines and are not identified as belonging to cost of sales or resale costs. Conservatively avoid adding any D&A to COGS to prevent misclassification.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment and Amortization of Intangible Assets

Earlier mapping explicitly excluded D&A from XSGA components, so this should be added separately later. Prefer the summary row over its components.
Component of the D&A summary row. Do not select individually because the summary row is present and avoids double counting.
Component of the D&A summary row. Do not select individually because the summary row is present and avoids double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment and Amortization of Intangible Assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of operating overhead component rows and explicitly excludes depreciation/amortization. A separate D&A summary line is present above operating profit, so it should be added separately to XSGA. The component D&A rows are not selected because the summary row is available.
